title: Инопланетный агент X
description:
Customize high-precision charactersPlayers can customize their characters by exchanging characters, costumes, weapons, actions, etc. through materials obtained through exploration or killing monsters. 

The characters in the game are all high-precision models and materials, with complete skin details, striving to restore the most realistic body. 

Melee weapons and firearms combination Players can attack close-range enemies with melee weapons. In melee combat, they can enchant combos to achieve high damage, roll over and hit hard, charge and hit hard, etc., and can also block damage from enemies.

Delicate skin and character modelsThe details of the character's skin are clearly visible, from skin wrinkles to pore texture.
description_short: Players can obtain materials and exchange them for corresponding characters, costumes, weapons, actions, etc. Supports body adjustment, taking photos, scene scanning, player chain connection.All multiplayer online. Currently in the early access most Unreal the scene will be changed later.
